name: RPlog_talk_Retribution_-_Jedi_and_Sith_Duel
title: Talk Page: One Line of Praise
summary: This is an out-of-character wiki talk page for the Retribution Jedi and Sith Duel log, containing a single offhand comment that the character Koro should have gotten his butt kicked, paired with praise that it was a sweet scene. There is no in-character roleplay content.
